metadata.description: A male-presenting individual in their 40s-50s has olive skin with some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is short, wavy, and salt-and-pepper gray, styled with volume on top and a natural hairline. The almond-shaped eyes are a striking light green, set slightly deep. Thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows frame the eyes. The nose is straight with a rounded tip and a well-defined bridge. The mouth has medium-full lips, curved into a broad smile revealing white teeth. A neatly trimmed, salt-and-pepper beard and mustache cover the lower face. The overall appearance suggests a South Asian heritage. The expression is one of gentle happiness, with the head turned slightly to the left and angled slightly upwards.
